text:
Mrs. Arlert was the mother of Armin Arlert.

Personality

Mrs. Arlert appeared to be a very courageous woman, willing to risk her own life in order to escape beyond the Walls. The fact that she and her husband were able to design a hot air balloon that would carry them beyond the Walls indicates that she was a remarkably intelligent woman.

History

Mrs. Arlert and her husband were both killed by Military Police Brigade member Djel Sannes for attempting to escape the Walls.

Trivia

Mrs. Arlert's design was debuted in the Attack on Titan Character Encyclopedia.
In Chapter 15, Armin claimed his mother and father were killed by Titans during the Operation to reclaim Wall Maria, it is unclear why he thought this when their attempt to leave Paradis on an air balloon occurred prior to the breach in the Walls.
